report.title: Reprint Push Progress
firstViewportText: Current proof is lab/model evidence: 77 Node tests plus packaged-plugin activation of /wp-json/reprint/v1/push/*, disabled packaged auth bootstrap, signed-store cleanup, 401 refusal for an unprovisioned alternate credential path, and dependency payload redaction. Package/auth-bootstrap hardening, signed-store cleanup, and dependency redaction are not production push support. Production push remains blocked by real credential lifecycle, durable journal storage, leases/fencing, WordPress graph identity, and general plugin drivers.
Scan view only. Detailed evidence lives in the linked docs.
